overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment. The scene transitions from a dark, neon-lit enclosed courtyard with vending machines and fire barrels, through industrial scaffolding and covered walkways, up a ramp tunnel, and finally emerging into a bright sunlit street lined with palm trees and industrial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard with vending machines and fire barrels

events.description: character stands up from seated position on couch and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: sitting on outdoor furniture in a dark courtyard, then standing up and walking through the enclosed area with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near fire barrel warming hands
NPC walking away from camera through the courtyard

entered.detail: Black vending machine with illuminated 'BIG BITE' signage and burger advertisement display
Metal barrel with open flames burning inside, casting warm orange light on surroundings
Industrial metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks and overhead walkways
Stack of wooden shipping pallets on the concrete ground
Various illuminated neon advertisements and signs on building walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, enclosed courtyard illuminated by neon signs and a burning fire barrel. The character sits on outdoor furniture then stands and begins walking through the area, passing a vending machine and several NPCs who are sitting or standing near the warmth of the fire. Metal scaffolding structures tower overhead in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered industrial walkway beneath metal scaffolding and overhead pipes

notable_agents.action: NPC in green shirt and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: Red and white striped concrete barriers blocking part of the walkway
Large metal pipes running overhead along the length of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the courtyard into a narrow covered walkway surrounded by industrial scaffolding and concrete barriers. Overhead pipes run the length of the corridor. An NPC walks toward the camera while the character continues forward beneath the metal structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered ramp ascending toward street level

events.description: approaching bright sunlight at tunnel exit, dramatic transition from dark interior to intense white light

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp through an enclosed tunnel toward the bright daylight visible at the exit

entered.detail: Concrete enclosed ramp with graffiti on walls, red lanterns hanging from ceiling, and industrial pipes
Intense white light streaming from the tunnel exit indicating outdoor daylight

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a covered concrete ramp tunnel with graffiti-covered walls and hanging red lanterns. The environment transitions from dimly lit to intensely bright as the character approaches the tunnel exit, with sunlight streaming in from the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban street with industrial buildings and palm trees

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright outdoor urban environment with palm trees and industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down a sunlit city street lined with palm trees, passing parked cars and industrial structures

entered.detail: Tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
Large industrial structures with green metal facades and smokestacks
Large industrial pipes spanning across the street overhead connecting buildings
Several parked cars along the left side of the street
Large vertical advertising billboards mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tunnel into a bright, sunlit urban street lined with palm trees. Large industrial buildings with green facades rise on the left, while massive overhead pipes span the street. The environment shifts from enclosed and artificial to open and naturally lit, with parked cars visible along the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark, neon-lit urban courtyard into a bright, sun-drenched industrial street. It begins in an enclosed space illuminated by neon signs and a burning fire barrel, moving past vending machines and idling NPCs beneath towering metal scaffolding. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a narrow covered walkway defined by concrete barriers and overhead pipes before turning toward a concrete ramp tunnel. The environment then transitions from the dim, graffiti-covered walls and red lanterns of the tunnel toward an intensifying glow of sunlight streaming from the exit. Finally, the camera emerges into an open urban landscape where the artificial shadows give way to a bright street lined with palm trees, green industrial buildings, and massive overhead pipes.
